data.title: Alex Karp Supports DOGE, As Trump Taps Palantir's Shyam Shankar For Border Security Role: 'Cannot Have A Better Person Than Musk'
data.description: Palantir CEO Alex Karp expressed strong support for The Department of Government Efficiency and Tesla's Elon Musk, on Thursday, Dec. 5, 2024, highlighting the intersection of technology and government reform.

data.title: Peter Schiff Questions Jim Cramer's Bullish Bitcoin Take As It Slumps From $100K: These Are Statements 'Made At Market Tops'
data.description: Staunch Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) critic Peter Schiff questioned financial analyst Jim Cramer’s bullish stance on the cryptocurrency on Thursday, likening it to remarks made at market tops.

data.title: Gamestop, Lululemon, Uber, Ulta Beauty And Tesla: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
data.description: On Thursday, major U.S. indices closed in the red, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average slipping 0.5% to 44,765.71.

data.title: Tim Cook Explains Why Apple Defied Steve Jobs' Design Philosophy With the iPhone 16's Camera Button, Touches On Retirement Plans: 'I'll Do It Until…'
data.description: Tim Cook discussed Apple's strategic evolution, including the iPhone 16's new camera button, Vision Pro sales, AirPods addressing hearing loss, and his future as CEO, emphasizing user experience, AI foresight, and health democratization.

data.title: SpaceX's Satellite Expansion Challenged: Ukrainian-Americans Allege Elon Musk's Russian Ties And Environmental Risks In FCC Petition
data.description: The Ukrainian Congress Committee of America filed a petition with the Federal Communications Commission on Wednesday, Dec. 4, 2024, challenging SpaceX's satellite deployment plans.
